title: Collaborative Robotics
description: Devised an experiment to test the concept of transparency in a collaborative environment using a Fetch robot.

title: DREAMs Lab Research
description: Focused on integrating conductive inks into FDM and SLA 3D printing processes to enable embedded electronics in printed parts.

title: Latis
description: Startup idea utilizing a decentralized network setup for secure firmware updates.

title: Politilink
description: GPT-3 Chrome extension that allows users to read articles and easily determine the associated representative they can contact about the article's topic.

title: TJ REVERB (2U CubeSat)
description: Contributed to the design and systems engineering of a small satellite (2U CubeSat), focusing on electronics and communication systems.

title: Band Aid Together
description: IoT-based seizure detection device using Arduino and Firebase for real-time emergency notifications.

title: Finance QuizzAR
description: An educational platform designed to teach financial literacy through interactive, augmented reality quizzes and gamified learning experiences (AR Quizleet).

title: Food Science NLP
description: Used Word2Vec NLP models to correlate sensory descriptions with chemical compounds in food, uncovering patterns in flavor science and chemistry.

title: Haptic Tactics
description: A device designed to simulate drilling for aerospace manufacturing, providing physical feedback in virtual reality environments, enhancing immersion through tactile hardware integration.

title: Teach4Charity
description: Founded a tutoring initiative that leveraged student expertise to raise over $4,000 for various charitable organizations.
